message:
test(mux): add 14 resize queue and replay edge case tests for localpane (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover: empty queue dequeue, seq monotonicity, replaced_seq chaining,
worker restart after idle, cancellation token for latest seq, single intent
clean completion, sequential non-overlapping intents, start/commit/cancel
with no in-flight, cancel-not-superseded, multi-cancel cascade, causality
log lifecycle coverage, queue depth hints reflecting worker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
